name: KILLJOY

abilities.name: Demise (Regrowth)
abilities.text: Once per turn. When this model is killed, it is placed in base contact with an Underbrush marker within 8". If it does so, it heals 4. Then remove the Underbrush marker.

abilities.name: Ruthless
abilities.text: This model ignores the (warding) abilities of other models.

abilities.name: Thrill of Battle
abilities.text: After killing a non-unique enemy, this model may drain a (soulstone) to declare the Charge action, ignoring special restrictions.

actions.name: Wyrdwood Cleaver
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is in base contact with severe terrain, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Decimate
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a non-unique model.

actions.name: Wyrdwood Chains
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is in base contact with severe terrain, this action receives a (+).
actions.effects: Move the target 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.

actions.name: Eerie Gate
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model is in base contact with an Underbrush marker, increase this action's Rg by 4".
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range, in base contact with an Underbrush marker.

extraction_notes: Warding icon in Ruthless ability text rendered as (warding)
Soulstone icon in Thrill of Battle rendered as (soulstone)
